g.text: Window: 2026-01-28 to 2026-04-30. Read clockwise: funding-rate pressure, balance-sheet plumbing, cross-market transmission, and a normalized
synthesis score. The synthesis score averages three displayed-window z-scores: average EFFR/SOFR/OBFR pressure versus IORB, reserve drain
measured as the negative change in reserve balances, and 4W bill pressure versus IORB. FRED inputs: IORB, EFFR, SOFR, OBFR, DTB4WK, WRBWFRBL,
